HOME.DESCRIPTION: Distribute expenses among party participants based on their consumption.
HOME.ABOUT_DESCRIPTION: This page is including some instructions what you can do on this website
HOME.STEP_2: 2. Click the "Add expenses" button and enter the required data.
HOME.STEP_3: 3. Click the button with a list image, to enter data about the items to be calculated.
HOME.STEP_4: 4. On the next page, add checks, which are used to group items by who paid for them.
HOME.STEP_5: 5. Open the appropriate check and add the items of this check.
HOME.STEP_6: 6. Use the edit and delete buttons to change data if it was entered incorrectly.
HOME.STEP_7: 7. Click the button with a calculator image, to calculate the expenses between the participants.
HOME.STEP_8: 8. Switch between tabs to see how much every participant spent on the party.
HOME.STEP_9: 9. On the "Transaction list" tab you can see how much money each participant owes to the people who paid for the party.

CALCULATIONS.TITLE: Expenses Calculation
CALCULATIONS.NO_DATA_HINT: Try adding new checks and items first.

TOUR.ADD_EXPENSE_CONTENT: Click here to create a new expense entry. This is the first step before you can calculate expenses - you need to provide a date, location (optional), and list of participants. After creating, you'll be redirected to the expenses details view.
TOUR.DATE_FILTER_CONTENT: Use this date range picker to filter expenses within a specific time period. Click the calendar icon to select dates, or click the X to clear the filter.
TOUR.SEARCH_FILTER_CONTENT: Search your expenses by location or participants. Use the dropdown to switch between filter criteria.
TOUR.EXPENSES_TABLE_CONTENT: This table shows the expenses. Click on any column header to sort your expenses by that field. The table below displays all expense rows, which you can double-click to view details.
TOUR.ACTIONS_MENU_CONTENT: Click the three dots button to access actions for each expense. You can open details, calculate expenses, edit, share with other users, or delete the expense entry.
TOUR.PAGINATION_CONTENT: Navigate through your expenses with these controls. Change the number of items displayed per page using the dropdown on the right.

TOUR_DETAILS.BACK_BTN_CONTENT: Click this button to navigate back to the expenses list view where you can see all your expense entries.
TOUR_DETAILS.ADD_CHECK_CONTENT: Click this button to create a new check. Checks are used to group items by location and payer. You'll need to specify the location and select who paid.
TOUR_DETAILS.EXPAND_CHECK_CONTENT: Click the plus icon to expand a check and view its items. Once expanded, you can add items that belong to this check.
TOUR_DETAILS.ADD_ITEM_CONTENT: Click this button to add items to the check. Specify the item name, price, quantity, and select which participants consumed it. The check total will update automatically.
TOUR_DETAILS.CALCULATOR_CONTENT: Once you've added all checks and items, click this button to view the calculations showing how expenses are split among participants.

TOUR_CALCULATIONS.BACK_BTN_CONTENT: Click this button to navigate back to the expense details view. If this calculations view is empty, you should return to the previous page and add checks with items first.
TOUR_CALCULATIONS.PARTICIPANT_TABS_CONTENT: Click on any participant tab to view their personal expense breakdown. You'll see all items they consumed, grouped by check, and their total expenses.
TOUR_CALCULATIONS.TRANSACTION_TAB_CONTENT: Click this tab to view the optimized transaction list. This shows the minimum number of transfers needed to settle all expenses among participants.

TOUR_RECOMMENDATIONS.TAG_FILTER_CONTENT: Use tags to organize and filter your items. Type a tag name and press Enter or click the + button to add it. Tags help you find items quickly by category, like #breakfast, #snacks, or #drinks.
TOUR_RECOMMENDATIONS.SEARCH_FILTER_CONTENT: Search your items by different criteria. Use the dropdown to switch between filtering by name, description, price, amount, total sum, user count, or rating. Type in the search box to find specific items.
TOUR_RECOMMENDATIONS.SORT_BAR_CONTENT: Sort your items by different attributes. Click the dropdown to choose a column (name, price, amount, total price, user count, or rating) and toggle between ascending and descending order.
TOUR_RECOMMENDATIONS.ADD_ITEM_CONTENT: Click this button to add a new item to your recommendations. You can add items with name, description, price, amount, rating, and tags. These are your personal items that you can only access from this recommendations view.
TOUR_RECOMMENDATIONS.ONLY_MY_ITEMS_CONTENT: Toggle this checkbox to show only the items you created. When unchecked, you'll see all items from all users you've shared expenses with, giving you a broader view of available items.
TOUR_RECOMMENDATIONS.ITEMS_GRID_CONTENT: Browse your item collection as cards. Each card shows the item's name, price, quantity, total cost, rating, and tags. Click the edit button on your own items to modify them, or click the arrow button on shared items to navigate to the original expense.

HERO.TITLE: Share Expenses Made Simple

STEPS.TITLE: Split Expenses in 3 Simple Steps
STEPS.SUBTITLE: From chaos to clarity in minutes

STEP1.TITLE: Add Your Expenses
STEP1.DESC: Enter the details of your shared expenses. Include location, amount, and who paid.

STEP2.TITLE: Split Among Friends
STEP2.DESC: Choose who participated in each expense. Our algorithm calculates fair splits automatically.

STEP3.TITLE: Settle Up
STEP3.DESC: See exactly who owes whom. Clear reports make settlement simple and fair.

TABS.TITLE: Everything You Need for Shared Expenses
TABS.SUBTITLE: Powerful features designed for real-world situations

EXPENSES.TITLE: Track Every Expense
EXPENSES.DESC: Keep detailed records of all shared expenses. From coffee runs to vacation costs, nothing slips through the cracks.

SPLIT.TITLE: Fair & Flexible Splits
SPLIT.DESC: Split expenses exactly how you want. Equal splits or by consumption - you decide.

CALCULATE.TITLE: Automatic Calculations
CALCULATE.DESC: Let our smart algorithms do the math. Get instant, accurate totals and per-person breakdowns.

TAGS.TITLE: Organize with Tags
TAGS.DESC: Create custom tags to categorize expenses. Filter by location, payer, or amount instantly.

RECOMMENDATIONS.TITLE: Smart Recommendations
RECOMMENDATIONS.DESC: Browse and search all your items across every expense. Find what you're looking for with powerful filters and sorting.
RECOMMENDATIONS.FEAT2: Sort by rating, price, or popularity

USE_CASES.TITLE: Perfect for Every Situation
USE_CASES.SUBTITLE: From dinners to vacations - manage any shared expense with ease

RESTAURANT.TITLE: Restaurant with Friends
RESTAURANT.DESC: Split the bill fairly after a group dinner. Track who ordered what, divide shared appetizers, and calculate tips automatically.

VACATION.TITLE: Group Vacation
VACATION.DESC: Track all trip expenses from hotels to activities. See who paid for what and settle up at the end without the hassle.

ROOMMATE.TITLE: Roommate Expenses
ROOMMATE.DESC: Manage shared household costs like groceries, utilities, and cleaning supplies. Keep track of monthly expenses effortlessly.

EVENTS.TITLE: Events & Parties
EVENTS.DESC: Organize group events and split costs for decorations, food, and venues. Perfect for birthdays, weddings, or celebrations.

ROAD_TRIP.TITLE: Road Trip Adventures
ROAD_TRIP.DESC: Track gas, tolls, food, and accommodation during road trips. Split costs fairly based on who participated in each segment.

TEAM.TITLE: Team Outings
TEAM.DESC: Manage work team lunches and outings. Track who attended, what they ordered, and handle reimbursements easily.

PROBLEM_SOLUTION.TITLE: Stop the Expense Tracking Nightmare
PROBLEM_SOLUTION.SUBTITLE: Turn chaos into clarity with smart expense management

PROBLEMS.P1_DESC: Spending hours with calculator and spreadsheets trying to figure out who owes what. Math errors lead to arguments and awkward conversations.
PROBLEMS.P2_DESC: Digging through endless group chats to find who paid for dinner last week. Receipts lost, memories faded, confusion everywhere.
PROBLEMS.P3_DESC: Someone always ends up paying more. Splitting equally when people ordered different amounts feels wrong but calculating fairly is too complicated.
PROBLEMS.P4_DESC: End of trip or month arrives and nobody knows the exact amounts. Multiple payment apps, partial payments, and confusion about who settled what.
PROBLEMS.P5_DESC: Looking for that great restaurant you visited last month? No way to search across all your expenses or remember which items were highly rated.
PROBLEMS.P6_DESC: Hard to see the big picture. Who spent the most? What's the total? No quick way to understand your group's spending without manual number crunching.

SOLUTIONS.S1_DESC: Enter expenses once and get instant, accurate calculations. Fair splits, exact totals, and clear breakdowns. No math required, no errors possible.
SOLUTIONS.S2_DESC: All expenses organized by date, location, and payer. Search anything instantly. Complete history at your fingertips, accessible anytime, anywhere.
SOLUTIONS.S3_DESC: Smart algorithms ensure everyone pays their exact share. Track who consumed what, split shared items proportionally, handle complex scenarios effortlessly.
SOLUTIONS.S4_DESC: See exactly who owes whom with one click. Complete transparency, detailed breakdowns, and smart insights about payment flows.
SOLUTIONS.S5_DESC: Search and browse all your items across every expense. Filter by tags, sort by rating or price, and navigate back to the original expense instantly.
SOLUTIONS.S6_DESC: See totals, per-person spending, and detailed breakdowns at a glance. Understand your group's expenses instantly with clear, comprehensive reports.

PROBLEM_SOLUTION.CTA_TITLE: Ready to Solve Your Expense Tracking Problems?
